# Agent Capabilities — what you can ask Agent X to do

<!-- GENERATED by scripts/gen-agent-capabilities.ts from src/tools/audience-map.ts.
     Do not edit by hand — run `npx tsx scripts/gen-agent-capabilities.ts` to refresh. -->

You talk to Agent X in plain language — it picks the tool. This lists the
capabilities surfaced to main chat, grouped by area. (Deeper tools load on
demand via tool search and aren't all listed here.)

## Common things you can say

- "change the app to dark mode"
- "dream now"
- "build me a todo app"
- "remember that I prefer tabs over spaces"
- "search the web for the latest on X"
- "what do you know about my projects?"
- "open google.com and search for X"
- "spawn an agent to research X"
- "take a screenshot of my screen"
- "every morning at 8, summarize my unread email"

## Full capability reference

### Filesystem & code

- `read` — Read a file's contents.
- `write` — Create or overwrite a file.
- `edit` — Make a targeted edit to a file. _e.g._ "edit index.html and change the title"
- `delete_file` — Delete a file.
- `bash` — Run a shell command. _e.g._ "run `npm test` in the project"
- `glob` — Find files by name pattern.
- `grep` — Search file contents.

### Web & search

- `web_fetch` — Fetch and read a web page. _e.g._ "summarize https://example.com"
- `web_search` — Search the web. _e.g._ "search the web for the latest on X"
- `http_request` — Make a raw HTTP request to an API.

### App self-control

- `setting` — Change app settings — theme, model, provider, voice, and more. _e.g._ "change the app to dark mode"

### Tool discovery

- `tool_search` — Discover deeper tools not loaded by default.

### Vision

- `view_image` — Look at an image you share. _e.g._ "what's in this screenshot?"
- `send_video` — Send/attach a video.
- `screen_capture` — Capture the screen. _e.g._ "take a screenshot of my screen"

### Memory

- `memory_search` — Search long-term memory. _e.g._ "what do you know about my projects?"
- `memory_save` — Save a fact to memory. _e.g._ "remember that I prefer tabs over spaces"
- `memory_recall` — Recall stored facts.
- `memory_get` — Fetch a specific memory entry.
- `memory_forget` — Mark a fact as no longer true. _e.g._ "forget that I use Coinbase"
- `memory_reflect` — Refresh entity summaries + opinion confidence. _e.g._ "update what you know about me"
- `memory_update_profile` — Update your user profile (name, role, preferences).
- `memory_stats` — Show memory statistics.
- `memory_consolidate` — Extract durable facts from recent chunks. _e.g._ "consolidate recent conversations"
- `memory_dream` — Tidy stored facts + launch the deep agentic reflection over recent transcripts. _e.g._ "dream now"
- `memory_ingest` — Ingest external text/history into memory.

### Operations

- `operation_start` — Begin a long-horizon, multi-step goal. _e.g._ "start an operation to ship feature X"
- `operation_list` — List active operations.
- `operation_status` — Check an operation's status.
- `operation_next` — Get the next step of an operation.
- `operation_advance` — Advance an operation a step.

### Worker-pool observation

- `op_status` — Check running background workers. _e.g._ "what are my background tasks doing?"
- `op_kill` — Stop a running worker. _e.g._ "cancel that background task"
- `op_redirect` — Redirect a running worker with new instructions.

### Autopilot

- `autopilot_start` — Start autonomous multi-step execution. _e.g._ "turn on autopilot"
- `autopilot_stop` — Stop autopilot.
- `autopilot_status` — Check autopilot status.

### Self-edit

- `self_edit` — Modify Agent X's own source via a coding agent. _e.g._ "fix a bug in your own code"

### Planning & tasks

- `enter_plan_mode` — Enter plan mode (propose before acting). _e.g._ "let's plan this first"
- `exit_plan_mode` — Leave plan mode and execute.
- `task_create` — Create a task. _e.g._ "add a task to refactor the parser"
- `task_update` — Update a task.
- `task_list` — List tasks.
- `task_get` — Get a task's details.

### Protocols

- `protocol_list` — List saved protocols (reusable workflows). _e.g._ "what protocols do you have?"
- `protocol_get` — Read a protocol.
- `protocol_search` — Search protocols.
- `protocol_create` — Save a reusable workflow. _e.g._ "save this as a protocol"
- `protocol_edit` — Edit a protocol.
- `protocol_delete`
- `protocol_unarchive`
- `protocol_pin`
- `protocol_list_archived`
- `protocol_stats`
- `protocol_prune`
- `protocol_archive_bulk`
- `protocol_curate`
- `protocol_curator_status`

### Mission scheduling

- `mission_schedule_create` — Schedule a recurring mission. _e.g._ "every morning at 8, summarize my unread email"
- `mission_schedule_list` — List scheduled missions.
- `mission_schedule_update`
- `mission_schedule_delete`
- `mission_schedule_toggle` — Enable/disable a scheduled mission.

### Agents

- `agent_list` — List available agents.
- `agent_spawn` — Delegate work to a sub-agent. _e.g._ "spawn an agent to research X"
- `agent_create` — Create a new named agent. _e.g._ "create a research agent named Scout"

### Project containers

- `project_create` — Create a project container. _e.g._ "make a project for the dashboard work"
- `project_list` — List projects.
- `project_add_agent` — Add an agent to a project.
- `agent_status` — Check a spawned agent's status.
- `agent_cancel` — Cancel a spawned agent.
- `agent_output` — Get a spawned agent's output.

### Browser

- `browser` — Drive a real browser. _e.g._ "open google.com and search for X"

### Apps

- `build_app` — Build a working app from a description. _e.g._ "build me a todo app"
- `app_create` — Create a new app scaffold.
- `app_list` — List your apps.

### Sidebar

- `sidebar_pin` — Pin an item to the sidebar. _e.g._ "pin this to the sidebar"
- `sidebar_unpin` — Unpin a sidebar item.
- `sidebar_clear` — Clear the sidebar. _e.g._ "clear the sidebar"

### Auto-build orchestrator

- `primal_run_build_plan` — Run a staged app-build plan.
- `primal_build_status` — Check an app build's status.
- `primal_build_resume` — Resume a paused app build.
- `start_app_build`
- `finalize_app_build`

### Secrets

- `request_secret` — Securely request + store a secret. _e.g._ "I need to store my OpenAI key"
- `request_secrets` — Request multiple secrets.
- `list_secrets` — List stored secret names (never values).

### Document creation

- `document_create` — Create a document. _e.g._ "write me a one-pager on X"
- `document_edit` — Edit a document.
- `document_read` — Read a document.

---
